# Punch Skater

> Punch Skater is a free-to-play cyberpunk card deck builder game developed by SP Digital LLC, available at https://punchskater.com.

## About

Punch Skater lets players forge unique AI-generated courier trading cards set in a dystopian cyberpunk universe. Players choose a character archetype, rarity tier, visual style, vibe, and city district to create a one-of-a-kind card with AI-generated artwork. Cards can be collected into decks and traded with other players.

The game is built as a progressive web app (PWA) and works entirely in the browser with no download required.

## Game World

The game is set across five city districts:
- **Airaway** — A floating sky-city above the clouds with levitating platforms and glass sky-bridges.
- **Nightshade** — An underground subway labyrinth (aka The Murk) with neon skateboards and blacklight murals.
- **Batteryville** — An off-grid desert compound with solar arrays and salvaged-tech markets.
- **The Grid** — A diesel-punk industrial wasteland with defunct refineries controlled by rival factions.
- **Glass City** — A cyberpunk neon megalopolis of glass skyscrapers where only electric skateboarders rule.

## Card System

Each card has:
- **Archetype**: Ninja, Punk Rocker, Ex Military, Hacker, Chef, Olympic, or Fash
- **Rarity**: Punch Skater (Common), Apprentice, Master, Rare, or Legendary
- **Style**: Corporate, Street, Off-grid, Military, or Union
- **Vibe**: Grunge, Neon, Chrome, Plastic, or Recycled
- **Stats**: Speed, Stealth, Tech, Grit, Rep
- **AI Art**: Three-layer composite artwork (background, character, frame) generated via Fal.ai-hosted FLUX LoRA models

## Features

- Card Forge — Generate unique courier cards deterministically from a seeded PRNG (Mulberry32)
- Collection — Browse and manage saved cards; export collection as JSON
- Deck Builder — Create and manage competitive decks; export as JSON
- Trading — Propose and accept card trades with other registered players
- Authentication — Email/password and Google sign-in via Firebase Auth
- PWA — Installable as a standalone app on desktop and mobile

## Technology

Built with React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Firebase (Auth + Firestore), and Fal.ai-hosted FLUX LoRA models for AI image generation.
